76249.subject: 🚧 Scheduled maintenance tomorrow
76249.body: 96 *{box-sizing:border-box}body{margin:0;padding:0}a[x-apple-data-detectors]{color:inherit!important;text-decoration:inherit!important}#MessageViewBody a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none}p{line-height:inherit}.desktop_hide,.desktop_hide table{mso-hide:all;display:none;max-height:0;overflow:hidden}.image_block img+div{display:none}sub,sup{font-size:75%;line-height:0} @media (max-width:620px){.row-content{width:100%!important}.stack .column{width:100%;display:block}.mobile_hide{min-height:0;max-height:0;max-width:0;display:none;overflow:hidden;font-size:0}.desktop_hide,.desktop_hide table{display:table!important;max-height:none!important}.row-2 .column-1 .block-1.image_block td.pad div{margin:0 0 0 auto!important}.row-2 .column-2 .block-1.image_block td.pad div{margin:0 auto 0 0!important}.social_block .social-table{display:inline-block!important}.row-1 .column-1 .block-3.paragraph_block td.pad,.row-1 .column-1 .block-4.paragraph_block td.pad,.row-1 .column-1 .block-5.paragraph_block td.pad{padding:10px 30px 30px 30px!important}.row-4 .column-1 .block-1.paragraph_block td.pad>div,.row-4 .column-2 .block-1.paragraph_block td.pad>div{text-align:left!important}} sup, sub { font-size: 100% !important; } sup { mso-text-raise:10% } sub { mso-text-raise:-10% } We’ll be performing a scheduled system upgrade tomorrow ..." ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌ ͏‌  Hello We’ll be performing a scheduled system upgrade tomorrow between 4:45pm - 5pm EST. During the maintenance window, the ether.fi app and credit card services will be temporarily unavailable for approximately 15 minutes.  We’ve scheduled the maintenance during low-traffic hours to minimize disruption. Thank you for your patience and understanding. The ether.fi Team Copyright © 2026 ether.fi. All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: ether.fi 90 N Church St George Town, Grand Cayman KY1-1000 Cayman Islands www.ether.fi You are receiving this email because you opted in via our app or website.   Want

76247.subject: How Trump Could Profit From Fast-Tracked Rebrand Of Palm Beach’s Airport
76247.body:
Forbes P.M.

Автор: Forbes


Автор: Forbes

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/how-trump-could-profit-from-fast-tracked-rebrand-palm-dnwgc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BmRzxrvlgRPWQlm1y7otcsQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2A4N-0DOf3RYk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrtqek6k~29-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrtqek6k-29
  
Good evening, President Donald Trump finally has an airport named after him. In a highly unusual arrangement, Palm Beach County owns and operates the airport, but Trump holds the trademark. Could the president and his family profit in the future from the airport? Here’s what we know. Thanks for reading! Kris Kornbluth Assistant Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads d3sign via Getty Images It Pays To Go Big On AI Integration, Study Finds A new study, shared exclusively with Forbes, shows the most impactful—and least expensive—solutions cross departments and data sets. Character AI, Lightfield AI Startups Are Pivoting From Flashy Demos To Tech That Pays The Bills Some founders are starting over in a high-stakes race for survival and revenue.
Приєднатися до обговорення
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/how-trump-could-profit-from-fast-tracked-rebrand-palm-dnwgc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BmRzxrvlgRPWQlm1y7otcsQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2A4N-0DOf3RYk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-fz96fz~mrtqek6k~29-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrtqek6k-29
  
      

----------------------------------------

Це повідомлення е-поштою адресовано учасникові Oleh Novosadov (I am 36 years old, and I am passionate about the world of cryptocurrencies and blockchain technologies. My professional interests include investing in cryptocurrencies, exploring blockchain, Web3, and the DeFi sector.)
Дізнатися, чому ми включили цю інформацію https://www.linkedin.com/help/linkedin/answer/4788?lang=uk&lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BmRzxrvlgRPWQlm1y7otcsQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2A4N-0DOf3RYk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-SecurityHelp-0-textfooterglimmer&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-SecurityHelp-0-textfooterglimmer-null-fz96fz~mrtqek6k~29-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrtqek6k-29
Ви отримуєте сповіщення е-поштою від LinkedIn. Інші бачитимуть, що ви є підписником.

76246.subject: UBIAN - Potvrdenie o zaplatení
76246.body:
Objednávka č. 13580502 vo výške 0.50 EUR zo dňa 7/20/2026 10:51 PM bola úspešne zrealizovaná.

Informácie o objednávke:

Parkovací lístok Košice, Tarifné pásmo A2
EČV vozidla: LE066BI
Začiatok parkovania: 7/20/2026 10:51 PM
Koniec parkovania: 7/20/2026 11:06 PM
Cena: 0.50 EUR

Prevádzkovateľ: Mesto Košice

Potvrdenie o zaplatení objednávky Vám príde až po skončení platnosti lístka. Potvrdenie bude možné stiahnuť aj po prihlásení na stránke https://www.ubian.sk v záložke Objednávky.

Lístok je elektronický, nemusíte ho zakladať za predné sklo vozidla. Pri kontrole systém automaticky overí, či pre dané EČV bol vydaný parkovací lístok.
Viac informácií nájdete na stránke https://parking.kosice.sk/.

S pozdravom
Tím Ubian

TransData s.r.o.
M.R.Štefánika 139
010 01 Žilina

telefón: +421 41 399 88 99
e-mail: info@ubian.sk
web: http://www.ubian.sk
